description_long: This object is a vintage IBM fax machine setup, featuring a bulky, off-white CRT monitor with a green monochrome display, sitting atop a rectangular base unit with dual floppy disk drives and a barcode sticker. The front area is organized with a beige keyboard, a classic two-button mouse on a blue mousepad, and a red ceramic mug. Scattered around the machine are stacks of colored folders, loose sheets of paper, and a few floppy disks, evoking a busy office environment. The rear of the machine shows thick power and data cables, as well as ventilation grilles. The overall construction is primarily plastic and metal, with visible seams and functional slots for paper and media. The design is utilitarian, with all interactive elements like the keyboard, mouse, and disk drives easily accessible from the front.
description: A vintage IBM fax machine with a CRT monitor, keyboard, mouse, and scattered office supplies, featuring a utilitarian plastic and metal build.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the back of the CRT monitor, power cables, and a stack of folders and papers in front.
description_view_1: Frontal view displaying the CRT screen with green text, keyboard, mouse, floppy drives, and a red mug, with office supplies spread around.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the depth of the monitor and base, the keyboard, mouse on a blue pad, and the red mug.
description_view_3: Direct rear view showing the back panel, ventilation grilles, and cable connections, with folders and papers visible to the side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is integrated into the front of the base unit, featuring two horizontal floppy disk drives side by side, a barcode sticker to the left, and a CRT monitor above displaying information. The keyboard is placed directly in front, with the mouse to the right on a blue pad. No dedicated button cluster or indicator lights are visible on the main body.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the front base of the machine, with a stack of colored folders and papers resting on it. It is horizontally oriented and appears to have a moderate capacity, suitable for holding several sheets or folders.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front center of the base unit, directly below the monitor and above the keyboard, with no visible guides or trays extending outward.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is visibly present or attached to the machine in any of the views.
